description: Style NoteUpdated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of shoes exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both!Heel: 2& rdquo Product DescriptionBlack and grey synthetic ballet flat style upper with fabric tie-ups at the toe box and cut- out patterningPadded fabric innerTextured TPU outsole with a heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
